say think?

Yeah.

Yeah.

We wanted to start calling that an agent now.

I think we think it's a more natural way for folks to refer to this.

Yeah.

That's...

no, I just wanted to add that when, you know, an agent is composed of a whole bunch of things like schemas and APIs and tools, the content of the agent is, we're referring to as a spec now.

Yeah.

It's not just, like, a little text box.
Okay, that makes sense.

Yeah, exactly.

Articles to make sure it's talking about it in the right way as well.

I think it's really cool and evocative to use, like, times and, like, specifically in that way.

My experience from talking to folks has also been, though, that people don't believe you when you say that kind of thing up front, it's like eight weeks, not BS, maybe someone else, not me, that would never happen to me.
And so I find myself leaning toward, instead of saying, like, eight weeks, just saying, like, days or weeks, like, do it in minutes or hours instead of days or weeks.
And then it's just, like, it creates a little bit of ambiguity.
And then also...
Also, I think it lands better and more believably to engineers that don't think it's going to take them eight weeks to build document processing.
Yeah, plus one on that.
Yeah, like orders of magnitude rather than precise numbers.
Yeah.
Yeah, I think that makes a lot of sense.
And the AI in general loves to, like, attach specific timelines to things whenever possible.
So that's something we can more explicitly steer it away from in the writing guidelines as well.
Yeah.
Sweet.
I think those are the two, like, specific, like, writing guideline things that I had in mind here.

Okay, great.

think it will unlock new keywords sort of around that building agents.

Awesome.

think our goal is still to grow like hell, and have SEO and AEO be a major part of that inbound story.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Refine content strategy and align on new product terminology.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Misalignment:** Calibration articles miss the "build vs. buy" premise, focusing instead on technical troubleshooting for a build-first approach.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**New Terminology:** Product units are now "Agents" (the API-callable output) and "Specs" (the long-form instructions), replacing the ambiguous term "document."](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [**Writing Guideline Updates:** Content will use relative timelines (e.g., "days vs. weeks"), avoid specific model numbers (e.g., GPT-4), and adopt a new AI-generated image style.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [**New Cadence:** Weekly syncs will shift to a bi-weekly schedule once the new content strategy is stable, with weekly project updates moving to Slack.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy & Calibration

  - [**Problem:** Calibration articles miss the "build vs. buy" premise from their titles.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
  - [**Analysis:** Content is skewed toward technical troubleshooting for a build-first approach, not a high-level comparison.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=390.0)
  - [**Root Cause:** A potential mismatch between the article's top-of-funnel goal and the technical persona it targets.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [**Solution:** Revise the article to frame building as a difficult path, then position Logic as the superior "buy" alternative. A second calibration article will also be created.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=418.0)

### New Product Terminology

  - [**Change:** "Document" is replaced by "Agent" and "Spec" for clarity and SEO alignment.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [**Rationale:** The term "document" was ambiguous, referring to both the API-callable output and the text-based instructions.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [**Definitions:**](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [**Agent:** The API-callable unit created in Logic.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [**Spec:** The long-form instructions (schemas, APIs, tools) that guide the Agent's behavior.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=542.0)
  - [**Impact:** Unlocks new SEO opportunities by targeting keywords like "agent building platforms" and "agent frameworks."](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1394.0)

### Writing Guideline Updates

  - [**Timelines:** Use relative terms (e.g., "days vs. weeks") instead of specific numbers (e.g., "8 weeks").](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Specific numbers are often unbelievable to engineers.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
  - [**Model References:** Avoid specific model numbers (e.g., GPT-4).](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Models quickly become outdated, making content look stale.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=770.0)
  - [**Image Style:** Adopt a new AI-generated style developed during the "12 days of content" push.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=871.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The style is editorial and human-like, avoiding the "AI slop" feel.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)
      - [**Implementation:** GrowthX will test replicating the style in their pipeline using Logic's "spec" document.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)

### Operational Updates

  - [**Airtable Review:** Azzam to review \~25 new article topics in Airtable by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [**Purpose:** Feedback will inform the next round of keyword research and help resume the 5-article/week cadence.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [**Meeting Cadence:** Syncs will shift from weekly to bi-weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
      - [**Timing:** The change is on hold until the new content strategy is stable.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
      - [**New Format:** Live syncs → Strategy & performance; Slack → Weekly project updates.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
      - [Revise calibration article to align with the "build vs. buy" premise.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=315.0)
      - [Update writing guidelines for new terminology, timelines, and model references.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
      - [Test replicating the new image style in the content pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1026.0)
  - [**Logic:**](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Share the "spec" document used to generate the new image style.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1085.0)
      - [Review and provide feedback on Airtable topics by tomorrow.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
      - [Submit a second calibration article for review.](https://fathom.video/share/GP3pSi2CH2WUBc6rbXG54_ec2A_Fh6ZM?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)

Revise calibration articles to agents/specs; send to Azzam
Send image-style Logic doc to Bailey; then GrowthX test/integrate, share results
Review Airtable topics; approve/comment by Jan 8
